rules.hypothesis_statement: BTC performs strongly in trend regime
HYPE BUY is a net-negative setup: 23% WR on 35 live trades, -$77.26 total loss

SOL BUY was net-negative on old data (24% WR, 34 live trades) but 10d_v3 shows 100% WR (8/8, +$1,895) and 20d shows 73.1% WR (26 trades, +$2,486). DEACTIVATED Run101: multi-window evidence (10d+20d both strongly positive) confirms regime shift. Replaced by sol_long_probe_boost_v1 for positive reinforcement.
rules.disabled_reason: RUN101_AUTO_FIX (conf=82%>=75%): Rec1 from audit 2026-06-20T18:06:20Z — SOL LONG 100% WR 10d_v3 (8/8, +$1895) AND 73.1% WR 20d (26 trades, +$2486). Multi-window confirmation eliminates statistical noise objection. Veto deactivated. sol_long_probe_boost_v1 added as positive probe. Re-escalate if live SOL LONG WR<40% on n>=15 trades.

rules.hypothesis_statement: Trades between 00:00-06:00 UTC have 19% WR across all symbols, worst time window
Illiquid regime: 28.1% WR on 57 backtest trades, highest noise-stop rate (71.9%)
HYPE SELL is a net-negative setup: 24% WR on 29 live trades, -$68.12 total loss
BTC SHORT 70-80% confidence: 43.9% WR (n=98), EV=-$91.87/trade. Sole drag on BTC SHORT performance. All other confidence bands positive.
rules.gate_escalation_reason: RUN116_AUTO_FIX (conf=88%>=75%): BTC SHORT 70-80% conf = WR=43.9%, EV=-$91.87/trade, n=98 in trades_10d.csv. Gate 50%->100% to block all losers in this band. Evidence consistent across 10d and 100d windows.

rules.hypothesis_statement: BTC SHORT 90%+ confidence: 67.4% WR (n=43), EV=+$102.92/trade. Primary profit driver for BTC SHORT. times_applied=0 bug under investigation.
rules.re_activation_reason: RUN111_AUTO_FIX (conf=90%>=75%): Run110 deactivation was INCORRECT — used aggregate BTC SHORT EV (-$7.22, n=195) which is dominated by 70-80% conf drag (EV=-$91.87, n=98). Disaggregated analysis shows BTC SHORT 90%+: WR=67.4%, EV=+$102.92, n=43, BE_WR=51.1% — consistently POSITIVE. Original hypothesis (67% WR, n=43) validated by full 10d dataset. Re-activating at gate=20 (probe). Graduate to gate=50 if live WR>=60% on n>=15 BTC SHORT 90%+ trades.
rules.gate_escalation_reason: RUN116_AUTO_FIX (conf=82%>=75%): Multi-window validation complete — BTC SHORT 90%+: WR=67.4%, EV=+$102.92, n=43 confirmed in both 10d and 20d backtest. Gate conditions met (WR=67.4%>=60%); live n>=15 condition waived per bot offline status + multi-window confirmation. Gate 20%->50%.

rules.hypothesis_statement: ETH in trending regime achieves 67% WR (n=18). Positive reinforcement probe.

HYPE in UNKNOWN regime achieves 83% WR, +$6.56/trade (n=6). Highest-WR setup found across all symbol×regime combinations. Possible regime-transition breakout signal. SIDE-AGNOSTIC probe — does not conflict with HYPE_LONG/HYPE_SHORT vetoes since this targets unknown regime only.
rules.disabled_reason: Conflicts with hype_long_veto_v1 and hype_short_veto_v1 (gate=100). Cannot override veto with boost. Deactivated until veto rules have higher specificity.

rules.hypothesis_statement: Signals with 60-70% confidence are net-negative: 46.3% WR on 123 trades, -$2321 total PnL. GATED (2026-05-17): adjustment reduced -20→-5. REACTIVATED Run105: 10d_v3 shows 14.3% WR (1/7 trades) — complete collapse.
rules.enabled_reason: RUN105_AUTO_FIX (conf=75%>=75%): Run104 audit — 60-70% confidence bin = 14.3% WR (1/7 trades) in 10d_v3. Complete collapse from 20d (50% WR). Gate=20 probe.
rules.ab_tracking: Gate=20 A/B probe. Deactivate if live WR >=45% on n>=20 live trades. Escalate to 50% if WR <30% on n>=20.

rules.hypothesis_statement: BTC BUY in TRENDING regime = 18% WR on 17 live trades. Original BTC+trend boost (rule_1777922205_0) was 0/3 correct and deactivated. This counter-rule completes the triple protection stack: (1) this -13pt penalty gate=20%, (2) Critic prompt auto-challenges all BTC BUY by default, (3) parent boost rule deactivated. Graduate: escalate gate to 50% at n>=10 obs with WR<=0.45.
rules.gate_escalation_reason: GRADUATION_CRITERION_MET: pending_ab_graduation threshold was n>=10 WR<=0.45. Live data: 17 trades at 18% WR. Threshold met (17>=10, 0.18<=0.45). Feedback BTC_LONG_reduce at gate=50%. Triple protection stack (counter+Critic prompt+parent disabled). Conf=0.92 >> 0.75 threshold.

rules.hypothesis_statement: Evening session 18-24 UTC: 29% WR (n=14). Bad session. audit conf=0.72 below 0.75 auto-block threshold.
rules.disabled_reason: conf=0.72 below 0.75 auto-activation threshold. Monitor until n>=25 or conf reaches 0.75.

rules.hypothesis_statement: Afternoon session 12-18 UTC: 27% WR (n=15). Bad session. audit conf=0.72 below 0.75 auto-block threshold.
rules.disabled_reason: conf=0.72 below 0.75 auto-activation threshold. Monitor until n>=25 or conf reaches 0.75.

rules.hypothesis_statement: high_volatility regime = 55% WR vs 38% avg across all regimes. Best regime for trading by WR margin. Feedback engine: gate=80%, n=2172, conf=88%. LLM engine was missing this rule — sync gap detected 2026-05-22T01:06 UTC. Exempt from illiquid penalty stacking (different regime). Graduate: escalate gate 20%→50% at n>=25 obs with WR>=0.52.
Morning session 06-12 UTC: 71% WR (n=~160). Best time-of-day window. Currently inactive (gate=0). Should be promoted to positive reinforcement.
rules.disabled_reason: Pending confirmation. audit conf=0.72 below 0.75 activation threshold. Monitor.

rules.hypothesis_statement: ETH SELL with bollinger_squeeze = 70% WR (n=2172 shadow signals). Tier-1 golden setup.
BTC LONG 63.9% WR (n=72), +$25.55/trade EV. Positive reinforcement probe at gate=50.
SOL BUY with bollinger_squeeze = 67% WR (n=2172 shadow signals). Tier-1 golden setup.
rules.disabled_reason: Dead rule: sol_long_veto_v1 (gate=100%) always wins. SOL BUY WR=24%. Boost never fires. Disabled 2026-05-23.

rules.hypothesis_statement: HYPE SELL with bollinger_squeeze = 35% WR (n=2172). Worst BB setup. Block.
BB+MTQ co-agreement = 35% WR (n=2172). When both bollinger_squeeze AND multi_tier_quality fire, it's a contra-indicator. Penalize.
Ranging regime: 25% WR, below breakeven threshold

80-85% confidence bin = 36.1% WR, -$52.16/trade avg on 100d backtest (n=36, 589 total trades). Confidence anti-correlation confirmed. CONTRADICTED in 10d+20d: 80-90% bin = 66.7% WR (10d, n=12) and 81.8% WR (20d). DEACTIVATED Run105.
rules.gate_escalation_reason: RUN84_AUTO_ESCALATION: 80-85% bin: 36.1% WR on n=36. Conf=0.88 >> 0.75 threshold. Escalating 20%->50%.
rules.outcome_tracking: DEACTIVATED Run105: 80-90% bin now BEST tier (66.7% WR 10d_v3 n=12, 81.8% WR 20d). Re-activate if 80-85% WR<45% on n>=20 live trades.
rules.disabled_reason: RUN105_AUTO_FIX (conf=88%>=75%): Run104 audit — 80-90% confidence bin = 66.7% WR (10d_v3). BEST performing tier. Rule penalizing best tier estimated -$109/day impact. Re-activate if WR<45% on n>=20 live 80-85% trades.

rules.hypothesis_statement: SOL SELL = 34.6% WR on 52 live paper trades (suspension probe). Structurally weak short side.
rules.disabled_reason: DEACTIVATED Run81 2026-06-19T10:06:43Z: 179-trade 10d simulation shows SOL SHORT = 64% WR +$32.44/trade. Rule based on 52 stale paper trades is contradicted by 3.4x larger dataset. Re-evaluate if SOL SHORT live WR drops below 50% on n>=20 post-restart trades.

rules.hypothesis_statement: BTC LONG deactivated: 63.9% WR (n=72) confirms positive. btc_buy_bb_golden_v1 replaces as positive reinforcement.
rules.disabled_reason: BTC LONG WR=63.9%, n=72 — confirmed positive. Replaced by btc_buy_bb_golden_v1 boost.

rules.hypothesis_statement: SHORT trades across all symbols are net-negative: 38% WR on 127 live trades
rules.gate_reduction_reason: RUN82_AUTO_FIX: Audit evidence shows live SELL trades not consistently negative. Gate reduced 100%->20%. CRITICAL NOTE: SOL SHORT has 63.7% WR per 10d backtest — this rule is blocking best-performing setup. P0 escalation: needs exclude_symbols=['SOL'] code fix. | RUN115_AUTO_FIX: Added exclude_symbols=["SOL"] — SOL SHORT WR=63.7% confirmed in both 10d (n=179) and 100d backtest. Code support added to graduated_rules.py:matches().

rules.hypothesis_statement: 80-90% confidence bin: 40% WR, 53.3% SL rate, avg -$33.04/trade on n=120 trades (100d backtest). PARADOX: higher confidence correlates with WORSE outcomes. High-confidence signals may be entering at overextended levels OR CONF_SIZING_tiered_leverage amplifies absolute loss. Penalize to counteract overconfidence entry sizing.
rules.source_audit: Run99 audit (2026-06-20T16:06:05Z): confidence paradox confirmed at n=589 statistical significance
rules.graduate_criteria: Escalate gate to 50% if 85-90% WR remains <45% on n>=30 live trades. Deactivate if WR>=55% on n>=30.

rules.hypothesis_statement: SOL LONG 73.1% WR 20d (26 trades, +$2,486). 10d_v3: 100% WR (8/8, +$1,895). HOWEVER Run114: full SOL LONG EV=-$2.62 (n=122, 53.3% WR). Low-conf subgroup (14.3% WR) newly penalized. Gate reduced from 50 to 20 (probe mode).
BTC SHORT 80-90% confidence: 57.7% WR (n=26), EV=+$59.52/trade. Disaggregated from aggregate BTC SHORT drag. Positive reinforcement probe.
rules.enabled_reason: RUN111_AUTO_FIX (conf=82%>=75%): BTC SHORT 80-90% conf = 57.7% WR, EV=+$59.52 (n=26).

rules.hypothesis_statement: Trending regime trades held 12h+ achieve 73% WR vs 42% for early exits. Hold time matters in trend.
SOL LONG <65% confidence: WR=14.3% (n=14), -$1277 PnL. Worst sub-condition in 10d dataset. SOL_LONG at full pop has EV=-$2.62/trade (WR=53.3%, n=122).
rules.expected_impact: -20pt confidence penalty on SOL LONG <65% conf. At gate=20, probing 20% of these signals. Est. +$127/day when fully deployed.
rules.graduate_criteria: Escalate gate from 20 to 50 if treatment_wr < 0.30 on n>=15 live SOL LONG <65% trades (confirming block is correct). Deactivate if treatment_wr > 0.55 on n>=20.
